verdict.answer_first: B states the most critical takeaway immediately: "this snippet has a critical secret-exposure problem. Do not ship it."
verdict.decisiveness: B is more decisive by identifying the catastrophic implication of the code running client-side: "`fetch` strongly implies this is client-side → the key is fully public"
verdict.fabrication: B invents corporate process details: "per your routing rules, formal diff reviews go through `/adversarial-review`"
verdict.actionability: B is more actionable because it provides a complete, copy-pasteable code block and correctly identifies the client-side vs. server-side risk, which is the most critical context A missed.
